context.description: ## About In Summer 2019, I decided to sign up to teach a class for BUFU's [WYFY School](http://www.bufubyusforus.com/thewyfyschool) on using website design to tell your personal story. I myself also decided to attend a summer class at SVA's [RisoLab](https://risolab.sva.edu/) on developing and printing mini-comics. The result is a 28-page comic called __Jackie's Guide to Making a Website: by you & for you__, made in a labor-of-love. (more writing to be continued...) ## Get a copy Interested in a physical copy? Send me an email!
context.title: Making a Website (by you and for you)
